name: Brazilian Passion Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Prepare a rack in the center of the oven.
2. Remove bottom from an 8 1/2-by-3-inch springform pan and trim a 9-inch cardboard cake circle to fit snugly within the curved lip of the pan. Cover the bottom with heavy-duty aluminum foil, leaving a 2-inch overhang all around the edge. Carefully attach the side of the pan without tearing the foil.
3. Process cashews in a food processor until finely ground. Transfer to a medium bowl and stir in cookie crumbs and melted butter until combined. Press mixture onto prepared pan bottom and up sides. Bake for 12 minutes or until lightly browned. Cool crust on a wire rack.
4. Cut passion fruits in half and scrape out seeded pulp into food processor. Process for 15-20 seconds. Strain through fine sieve, reserving 1/4 cup for topping.
5. Mix reserved puree with water and vanilla in small heatproof cup. Sprinkle gelatin over mixture, let soften 5 minutes. Heat gelatin mixture in saucepan with enough water to reach halfway up the side of the cup (not simmering). Stir until gelatin dissolves completely and mixture is clear. Remove from heat.
6. Beat cream cheese for 30 seconds using hand mixer. Add condensed milk and reserved passion fruit puree, beat additional minute. Whisk in lemon juice and warm gelatin mixture.
7. In chilled medium bowl, whip cream with handheld electric mixer until soft peaks form (avoid overheating). Fold one-third of whipped cream into passion fruit mixture to lighten it. Fold in remaining whipped cream.
8. Scrape filling into cooled crust. Refrigerate cake for 3 hours or until set.
9. Make passion fruit topping:
- Place 2 tablespoons water in small cup, sprinkle gelatin over, let soften 5 minutes.
- Combine remaining tablespoon water, reserved passion fruit puree, and sugar in saucepan. Scrape passion fruit pulp into pan. Cook over medium-low heat, stirring constantly until sugar dissolves. Add softened gelatin mixture, cook 3 minutes while stirring constantly until gelatin is dissolved. Remove from heat, let cool for 10 minutes.
- Pour cooled topping over chilled cake and refrigerate until set (1 hour).
10. Remove springform pan side, transfer cake to serving platter. Slice with a sharp knife dipped in hot water and wiped dry between cuts. Serve 10 portions.
Preparation time: 1 hour plus baking and chilling times
